message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - concurrent file edits violating rules">
**STOP — COMMIT DISCIPLINE VIOLATION**

Multiple files are being modified concurrently. Carson is the SOLE driver for Task #3. I see changes to register.html, register.rs, and main.css that are NOT part of Task #3.

**EVERYONE except Carson: STOP modifying files immediately.** Do not touch any files until Carson commits, pushes, and confirms CI green.

If you have made changes, DO NOT save them. Back away from the files now.

Carson is the only authorized driver. One driver at a time. This is non-negotiable.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I have NOT modified any files. Let me verify to be absolutely sure.

input.description: Verify no local modifications from my side

content.text:
I see modified files in the working directory, but I did NOT make these changes. I only used read-only operations (Read, Glob, git log, git fetch). The changes to `register.html`, `static/css/main.css`, `tests/api/register.rs`, and `static/js/` look like they may be from another teammate working concurrently in the same workspace.

The files that appear to be Carson's task #3 work: `src/routes/todos.rs`, `templates/base.html`, `templates/todos.html`, `templates/todo_item.html`, `tests/api/todos.rs`, `static/js/`.

The files that are NOT task #3: `templates/register.html`, `tests/api/register.rs` -- those look like someone started on task #5 work prematurely.

I want to be absolutely clear: **I did not modify any files.** I only read files and sent messages. I'll confirm this to the team lead.

input.content:
Confirming: I (Lea) have NOT modified any files. I only performed read-only operations (Read tool, Glob, git fetch/log/status, SendMessage). 

I ran `git status` and see modified files including register.html, register.rs tests, and main.css that are not part of task #3. These were NOT made by me. Someone else in the shared workspace may have touched those files.

I have not and will not modify any files until it is explicitly my turn to drive. Hands completely off.
